responses.text: About 40% of suicide prevention organizations in Japan have temporarily closed or reduced their working hours due to the epidemic
Suicide rates increased by 37% among women and by 49% among children and adolescents
The number of suicides in Japan fell by 14% during the first wave of the pandemic in February-June 2020
The suicide rate in Japan increased by 16% in July-October last year
The number of suicides dropped dramatically in Japan, especially in March-April, with a 27% decrease in women and a 21% decrease in men.
The economic problems brought about by COVID-19 contributed to the increase in the number of suicides.
The number of suicides under the age of 20 was 659, an increase of 10.0% year-on-year, the highest since 2000.
The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the frequency of people feeling lonely in Japan.
The number of suicides in Japan reached 21,077 in 2020, the first increase in 11 years, and even 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
359 fewer people committed suicide in April compared to the same month last year in Japan.
A long-term economic downturn caused by the epidemic could lead to a rebound in the suicide rate
The suicide rate for children under the age of 20 rose by 49 per cent during the second wave.
Unemployment rose within nine months of the official start of the pandemic in Japan.
Suicide ranked first among causes of death among 20-24 year olds in Japan
Suicide rates in Japan declined between 2009 and 2019, but the trend reversed after the outbreak of COVID-19.
The impact of the epidemic on the suicide rate is often intermittent and will probably rise when unemployment and economic depression appear.
Around 20,919 people died by suicide in 2020, an increase of 3.7 percent from the previous year.
Studies show that suicide rates among women and school-age children in Japan rose during August, giving a glimpse of the impact of the coronavirus crisis on people’s mental health.
Suicide ranked first among causes of death among 25-29 year olds in Japan
Japan's suicide rate fell below 20,000 for the first time in 40 years.
Unemployment, social isolation and concern for the future are contributing to the rise in suicide cases in Japan.
The suicide rate of people under the age of 20 reached an all-time high of 3.1, an increase of 0.3 points year-on-year.
Japan's labor and social welfare loopholes have been exposed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
Japan ’ s October suicides are “more than all Coronavirus deaths this year”
The number of male suicide victims in Japan decreased by 135 in 2020 compared to the previous year.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas announced that the Palestinians would no longer abide by their agreements with Israel and Washington.
The Abraham Accord assumed that the Arab world no longer cares about the suffering of the Palestinians, but is content to let its own government embrace Israel based on other common interests.
Senior Palestinian negotiators Saeb Erekat said the PLO reserves the "right to withdraw from the interim agreement", an important part of the Oslo Accords.
Thousands of Palestinians demonstrated against the Abrahamic Agreement in the West Bank and Jerusalem.
Palestinian leaders denounced the agreement on the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called for an extraordinary meeting of the Arab League as well as an urgent meeting of Palestinian leaders and groups to discuss the consequences of the agreement.

Mahmoud Abbas said at a meeting of Fatah Central Committee in Ramallah that if Israel annexes even one centimeter of the Abrahamic Shrine in Hebron or Al-Aqwar or settlements, Palestine will cancel all agreements with Israel and the United States.

Saeb Erekat, secretary-general of the Palestine Liberation Organization (PLO) and senior negotiator, said the removal of the Palestinian self-rule areas from the list "is not about U.S. national interests, but about advancing the agenda of the Israeli settlement committee".

Palestinians in the Gaza Strip and the West Bank demonstrated Saturday to express their anger against the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and the Zionist regime, and burned pictures of the crown prince of Abu Dhabi.

Bandar bin Sultan criticized Palestinian leaders in the first part of the interview with Al-Arabiya TV, saying that the statements of Palestinian leaders after the UAE and Bahrain agreements with Israel were painful.

Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called on the Palestinian Central Council to hold a meeting in the middle of next month to make appropriate decisions on relations with Israel and the United States.
The Abraham agreement actually destroyed decades of consensus and was denounced by Palestinian leaders as a ‘betrayal’.

Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas will give a speech to the UN Security Council in February, in which he will express the Palestinian position, in particular, to end the Israeli occupation and establish an independent Palestinian state with East Jerusalem as its capital while preserving the 1967 borders.

Barham Saleh, in a phone call with Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas, discussed the developments in the situation in the Holy Quds and the Palestinian land, and called the aggressions and attacks that are happening by the Israeli regime against the Palestinian people inhumane.
Palestinian leaders burned all peace opportunities with Israel one after the other, despite the financial and political support of Saudi Arabia and other Arab countries in the region.
Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas has assured US President Donald Trump that he is ready to immediately begin negotiations with Israel
The United States and Israel have replaced international law with the Deal of the Century according to Mahmoud Abbas
US plans to close Palestine Liberation Organization (PLO) office in Washington

Two people were injured when a Palestinian rocket fired in protest against the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain and Israel, and Israel responded by bombing the Gaza Strip.

Mostafa Barghouti, the leader of the Palestinian Initiative Party and a former member of the legislature in the country, emphasized that no Palestinian can accept the anti-Palestinian plan of the Deal of the Century and enslave himself to the Zionist occupation regime.
Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas spoke by phone with the US Secretary of State about the latest developments in Palestine and the ceasefire in the Gaza Strip.

According to the Times of Israel, the recent escalation of violence between Zionists and Palestinians has caused doubts among Arab countries that have established and normalized their relations with the Zionist regime and have pressured the Abraham agreement.
The Palestinian Government of National Accord demanded from Hamas the transfer of control of the Gaza Strip to Ramallah

Hamas spokesman Hazem Qasim said in a statement that the resumption of the policy of assassinating Palestinian leaders means the start of a new war and resistance will never allow harm to the leaders of the Palestinian people and will not remain silent in the face of any crime.
Mohammed bin Salman said Palestinian leaders should either go to the negotiating table with peace proposals or shut up and stop complaining.
Nose surgery is at the top of the country's cosmetic surgeries
The number of cosmetic surgeries in the UK rose sharply last year, with breast implants and liposuction among the most popular.
One percent of the world’s cosmetic surgeries and half a percent of non-surgical cosmetic procedures are performed in Iran.
37.5% of foreign patients go to cosmetic surgery and dermatology hospitals

Some doctors in China have suggested that it should be subdivided within the scope of cosmetic surgery, such as breast augmentation and other large operations are indeed dangerous in flight, but very small cosmetic surgery such as eyebrows, lips, and double eyelid cuts have no great impact on passengers' own safety.
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry reached £2.3 billion in 2010.
Changing lifestyle in Iran is one of the factors contributing to the increasing demand for cosmetic surgeries.
The most popular medical services in Malaysia include cosmetic surgery, dentistry and dermatology.
Correcting complications from unauthorized cosmetic surgeries can be costly and time-consuming.
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry is expected to grow to £3.6 billion in 2015.
Iran is the second in the world in performing beauty surgeries.
Taiwan is the first choice for many overseas Chinese and foreign people to perform plastic and cosmetic surgery.
Many people who go to the doctor for cosmetic surgery, especially the nose, have mental and psychological problems.
Last year alone, the number of rhinoplasty, facelift and breast augmentation surgeries in Britain increased by 10 percent over the previous year.
The market for cosmetic surgeries in Iran is highly active, with many people seeking attention to their skin, face, beauty, and rejuvenation.

There are more than 4,000 plastic surgery clinics in South Korea, the world’s largest cosmetic surgery rate, with 13 out of every 1,000 people in the country’s 49 million people having cosmetic surgery.
Excessive overtaking of cosmetic surgeries has occurred even during the Coronavirus pandemic.
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry was worth £750 million in 2005.
Non-invasive cosmetic surgeries, such as Botox, gel, and laser injections, are also common in Iran.
The enquiry of foreign patients for cosmetic procedures has also increased, with online consultations and preparations to come for procedures as soon as travel restrictions are lifted.
Men are also sometimes candidates for cosmetic surgeries for various reasons
The total number of cosmetic procedures performed in the UK in 2013 was 50,122, an increase of 17% year-on-year.
Dr. Hamid Reza Fathi stated that the most common cosmetic surgeries for women in Iran are rhinoplasty, breast, eyebrow, and eyelid surgeries, as well as liposuction.
Private medical and aesthetic institutions in China are mainly cosmetic surgery, but have very few doctors who truly specialize in cosmetic surgery.

Li Yanshou, director of forest management in Nantou, said that it is hoped that these small pocket parks will gradually expand their scope and expand from various community development associations to the whole countryside, creating a new bright spot in the community.
Qiaoren Park will provide a safe and convenient recreational space for the public and children.

New Taipei Civil Affairs Minister Ke Ching-chung said that in traditional urban areas with high population densities such as Xinbei Banqiao, Xinzhuang, Wugu, and Sanchong, most park facilities have reached the end of use.
In Hongkou District, a pocket park was built after a number of illegal buildings were demolished.

Chu Si-jung, mayor of Xinzhuang, pointed out that Jianfu Park and Shuangfeng Park originally had only a few traditional children's toys, which were less interesting, and the five senses of children were more single.
A small green space of only 500 square meters has been installed with three leisure seats and some small outdoor fitness equipment at the corner of Fuxing East Road and Zhonghua Road.
There are 243 urban parks in Shanghai, and by 2020, the number of urban parks will reach 300, forming a three-level system of "pocket parks - community parks - regional parks".
The participatory budget concept allows residents and children to jointly plan a special park.
The park's public square can hold small art activities for the benefit of the public.
Valiasr city has a high population density and the park is intended to provide a suitable context for recreation and entertainment of residents and families.
The municipal greening and cityscape administration bureau plans to build or upgrade 50 pocket parks this year.
A flowerbed with a bridge will be built in the "pocket square" on Enthusiasts street to make it interesting for children to play.
Pocket Park is not clearly defined, but refers to small green open spaces scattered in plaques in the city.
Turkish TV series has been broadcast as the country’s soft power in recent years, especially on the television of Arab countries.
Turkish TV series are the most popular among all series in Uzbekistan, having overtaken both Korean and local Uzbek series.
Recent research by Turkish state television shows that Turkish dramas are a “soft power, ” often trying to convey a specific image in the form of a romantic historical drama from the Ottoman period.
Turkey is the largest producer of domestic and television series after the United States, with 150 Turkish series exported to more than 100 countries.
Turkish TV shows are considered close to the life, culture, and mentality of a simple resident of Uzbekistan, despite being "foreign".
The Turkish TV series “The Queen is a songbird ” was liked by Russian viewers.
Turkey’s addiction to the Turkish series has also reached Israel.
Turkish series are popular in the Middle East, but according to a spokesman for Dubai-based media group MBC, the TV company has stopped broadcasting the series.
The Turkish series dubbed and broadcast by satellite networks provide sexist, pornographic, aristocratic and corrupt narratives of Turkish families.
In Russia, it is proposed to ban the broadcast of Turkish TV series and films on television.
Many TV channels in Uzbekistan are betting on Turkish TV series to raise ratings and expand their audience.
According to the Dubai TV website, at least one other Turkish series is still on the air.
More than 150 Turkish series have been exported to more than 100 countries, according to the Turkish Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
Relations between Turkey and Saudi Arabia have deteriorated to the point that even Saudi Arabia’s MBC TV group, which broadcasts Turkish series in Saudi Arabia, stopped broadcasting them last year.

The influence of Turkish series in many countries of the world has led many viewers of these series to visit the magnificent mansions and palaces that were once the location of their favorite stories.
Chile, Argentina, Mexico, China, Russia, Korea and Japan are the largest customers of Turkish series, respectively, according to a report in The Guardian.
Perseverance has an experimental installation MOXIE to receive oxygen from carbon dioxide in the atmosphere of Mars.
The MOXIE installation was used to obtain oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars.
The Rover Perseverance is moving to Mars and carries a device called MOXIE, which will allow scientists to get oxygen from carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere.
Mars Rover Perseverance tested the technology of extracting oxygen from the Martian atmosphere using the instrument MOXIE.
NASA’s Perseverance successfully converted some of the carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere into oxygen.
Perseverance has a special mission to make oxygen on the red planet using a device called MOXIE

The California Supreme Court declined to hear an appeal by Bayer AG, which sought to overturn a jury ’ s ruling that the company ’ s Roundup herbicide caused a gardener to develop cancer, leaving the company with few other options to avoid paying the $20.4 million verdict.

Bayer AG will announce that it has reached an approximately $10.5 billion agreement with plaintiffs in the United States who have accused its Roundup herbicide of causing cancer to settle tens of thousands of lawsuits.
Bayer AG reached a settlement to settle 75 percent of the 125,000 lawsuits alleging cancer caused by its top-selling herbicide Roundup.
Bayer, the German chemical company, said on Wednesday that a legal dispute over cancer caused by its Roundup brand herbicide has reached a $2 billion settlement with regulators.
Monsanto has been sued in the United States for suspected cancer caused by the herbicide Roundup, and Bayer is seeking to settle the lawsuit with $11 billion in damages.
Bayer offered to pay $8 billion to settle claims over the herbicide Roundup.
Bayer has been accused by farmers of causing cancer by the Roundup herbicide product.
Bayer AG paid a $10.9 billion settlement to settle concerns about the safety of its herbicide Roundup.
Bayer has reached a verbal agreement to end a large portion of the roughly 125,000 cancer-related lawsuits that Roundup herbicides have triggered in the United States.
German pharmaceutical company Bayer said its U.S. company Monsanto production of herbicide "Roundup" reported cases of cancer in the United States in the second quarter of about 5,000 new cases.
Bayer, a German chemical and pharmaceutical company, has reached a settlement with many plaintiffs in the United States in a legal dispute over a herbicide containing glyphosate.
Bayer announced plans in June to settle all legal lawsuits against Monsanto for $12 billion.
Top managers of Bayer promised to continue fighting lawsuits against Monsanto in connection with the herbicide Roundup

In the Italian city of Piacenza, a gardener peeled ivy off the wall in the Ricci Oddi gallery and accidentally found a painting by Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a Woman ” stolen 22 years ago from the same gallery.

Two men admitted that 22 years ago they stole and then returned the painting by Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a Woman” and not all the time kept it in a niche in the wall of the Ricci Oddi gallery in Piacenza, Italy, where it was found by gardeners.
The stolen painting “Portrait of a Lady” by Gustav Klimt was found wrapped in a black cloth bag and hidden by a metal plate in the garden wall of the Ricci Oddia Piacenza Modern Art Museum.
An art student discovered that "Portrait of a Lady" had been painted on another painting by Gustav Klimt, "Portrait of a Young Lady", shortly before the painting was stolen.
Experts confirmed the authenticity of the found picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, which was stolen in 1997 from a gallery in the Italian Piacenza.
A painting by Gustav Klimt, a famous Austrian artist, discovered after decades at the site of the robbery, is on display again in its former location.
Austrian painter Gustav Klimt ’ s Portrait of a Lady was stolen for 23 years.

Italian authorities on Friday confirmed the authenticity of a painting by Gustav Klimt, a famous Austrian artist, that was stolen in 1997 and was recently discovered in the same Italian gallery where it was stolen.
The list of cultivated crops has changed in the country due to climate change.
Climate change and global warming are changing the growth patterns of agricultural crops.
Climate change is putting food security at risk.
Climate-related factors have already had a major impact on agricultural productivity.
Climate change threatens future gains in commodity crop production and endangers rural livelihoods.
The increase in temperature has caused behavioral changes in the field of agriculture.
Climate change has negatively impacted agriculture and food security in Pakistan.
Warnings about the possibility of droughts and the loss of positive agricultural growth due to crop loss are serious
Warm winters will have an impact on crops.
Agricultural productivity has fallen sharply due to the effects of climate change.
The trend of climate change this year, with the reduction of rainfall and early heat in the winter season, caused a significant part of the province ’ s farmers to face problems.
Farmers need to take into account climate change and adapt to it.
Climate change can affect the crops and products of various crops, plants, animals and so on.
The impact of climate change will further exacerbate the threats and challenges faced by the agricultural sector.
The Golden Bear for Best Film of the 70th Berlinale goes to "Sheytan vojud nadarad" (There Is No Evil), directed by Mohammad Rasoulof.
The French and British coastguards have repeatedly intercepted boats attempting to transport Asian and African migrants across the English Channel to Britain.
235 illegal migrants in 17 boats attempting to cross the English Channel from northern France were intercepted by British Coast Guard and Border Guard officers on Thursday.
A group of refugees trying to cross the English Channel were rescued by French border guards
Nearly 100 refugees crossed the English Channel this week by boat, trying to reach Britain from France to seek asylum.
Britain has announced an unacceptable increase in the number of boats that transport migrants through the English Channel
British and French Coast Guard vessels have picked up about 300 people trying to cross the English Channel in inflatable boats to get to the UK since November.
The issue of migrants attempting to reach the UK via the English Channel on kayaks, inflatable boats and small vessels is nothing new, and dozens have been rescued and detained in recent months.
British officials said on Monday that the coast guard had handed over 36 asylum-seekers who were trying to cross the English Channel on three separate boats.
The authorities of the UK and France detained on Saturday 74 migrants who made an illegal attempt to cross the English Channel.
French authorities intercepted 19 migrants trying to sneak into Britain in the English Channel yesterday night.
British border guards and the coast guard rescued about 50 refugees who were trying to get into the country from France, sailing across the English Channel in rubber boats.
British border guards on Sunday detained in the English Channel four boats with 39 migrants who were trying to reach the shores of the United Kingdom.
British services intercepted more than 80 migrants trying to reach the shores of the United Kingdom by boat through the English Channel.
71 illegal immigrants who tried to cross the English Channel in several boats, on Thursday night was intercepted by the coast guard of France and the UK.
Stratolaunch Systems conducted the first flight of the world's largest carrier aircraft Stratolaunch.
Stratolaunch was designed to launch space rockets.
The wingspan of the Stratolaunch aircraft reaches 117 m
The Stratolaunch aircraft made the first test flight on Saturday, April 13
The central part of the Stratolaunch aircraft is designed to mount space rockets
Stratolaunch is designed for the air launch of launch vehicles.
Stratolaunch is considered to be the largest operational aircraft in the world.
Stratolaunch, the world ’ s largest rocket aircraft, made its first flight in mid-April.
The Stratolaunch is the largest carrier aircraft ready to transport supersonic vehicles.
Stratolaunch is the world’s largest aircraft with the longest wingspan.
A video of the first flight of the largest aircraft in the world, a twin-body six-engine aircraft company Stratolaunch Systems, appeared on the Network.
The test of the Stratolaunch aircraft passed successfully
The Tour de France organizers filed an official complaint against the fan who caused the crash.
Five days ago, spectators at the Tour de France held up handwritten signs blocking the lane, causing a tragic crash.
French police arrested the culprit of the mass fall of the participants of the Tour de France
French police have detained a woman suspected of causing a serious accident during the famous Tour de France cycling race, waving a poster on the track for athletes.
45 km before the end of the first stage of the legendary cycling race "Tour de France" there was a massive blockage, as a result of which more than two dozen athletes were injured.
One of the victims could not continue to participate in the first stage of the Tour de France.
Crew Dragon can be used multiple times for space missions.
SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft with two astronauts on board flew to the International Space Station.
SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft has successfully docked to the International Space Station.
SpaceX successfully launched the Crew Dragon spacecraft with two astronauts of the US space agency NASA on board.
Elon Musk sent to the ISS the ship Crew Dragon with four astronauts on board
SpaceX launches manned Crew Dragon-2 to the ISS.
American and Japanese astronauts moved from SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft to the International Space Station.
SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft docked with the International Space Station for the first time last weekend.
The Crew Dragon spacecraft will carry four astronauts to the International Space Station
Iran's killing of Ukraine Flight 752 was a terrorist act, according to a Canadian court ruling.
Some relatives of the dead passengers of the UIA flight PS752, shot down by the Iranian military, filed a lawsuit against Iran in the Federal Court in Washington.
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky threatened to sue Iran in international courts for the downing of Flight 752 and failing to deliver the black box of the plane.

The judge of the court emphasized that based on available evidence, the IRGC ’ s missile attacks on Ukrainian International Flight PS752 in the winter of 1398 were intentional and directly caused the death of all the passengers of the aircraft.

A spokesman for Iran’s foreign ministry said the Canadian court had no jurisdiction to investigate the Ukrainian plane crash or a possible failure in an incident that occurred outside Canada’s territory.
Four survivors of the victims of Flight 752 have publicly filed a lawsuit against Iran in Ontario, along with a woman who does not want to be named.

A Washington-based legal office filed a complaint on behalf of relatives of the victims of Ukraine International Airlines Flight 752 who were American citizens against the Islamic Republic government led by Ali Khamenei and the Revolutionary Guards under the command of Hossein Salami.
The Supreme Court of the Canadian province of Ontario ruled that Iran should compensate families who sued for the plane crash that killed 176 people
Canadian lawyers have filed a class action lawsuit against Tehran on behalf of the victims of the crash of the Boeing 737-800 plane of Ukraine International Airlines.
Ukraine threatens to launch a legal process against Iran in the Ukrainian plane incident case
A Canadian court has no jurisdiction to hear a claim for damages in the crash of a Ukrainian passenger plane shot down by Islamic Revolutionary Guards

Some of the families of the victims of the downed Ukrainian plane have petitioned foreign countries to stop their flights from Iranian airspace until the Islamic Republic authorities cooperate on the case.
The plaintiffs in the case "have proved that the downing of Flight 752 by the defendants is a terrorist act".
Russia's embassy in North Korea announced that North Korea had detained a Russian fishing boat and detained 15 Russian and two South Korean crew members on board for illegal entry.
A Russian fishing vessel suspected of mechanical failure, including its engine, drifted to the North Korean coast and is being detained by the North Korean authorities.
North Korea detained a Russian fishing boat “Xiang Hai Lin 8” flying a South Korean flag and breaking into the territorial waters early on the 17th, with 15 Russians on board and 2 South Koreans.

The Russian embassy in North Korea said it had released a Russian fishing vessel that had been detained 11 days earlier, saying it was leaving for a South Korean port where two South Korean crew members would come ashore.
North Korea brought water to the detained Russian ship

The Russian embassy in North Korea quoted the North Korean Ministry of Foreign Affairs as saying that the fishing vessel violated the "entry and stay in the territory of North Korea" and was extradited to the North Korean port of Wonsan.
The Russian Federal Security Service announced that two North Korean fishing vessels and more than 80 North Korean citizens have been detained for illegal fishing in Russian waters.
North Korea has held a Russian fishing boat with 17 sailors on board for a week
A Russian fishing boat carrying two South Koreans was seized by North Korea as it drifted in North Korean territorial waters in the East Sea of the Korean Peninsula.
Japan to withdraw from International Whaling Commission in order to resume commercial whaling
Japan withdrew from the IWC to restart commercial whaling in its territorial waters and exclusive economic zones
Japan is resuming commercial whaling for the first time in 37 years.
Japan begins third year of commercial whaling
The international community has condemned Japan's decision to restart commercial whaling
Ernest Hemingway wrote from real, live experiences.
Ernest Hemingway became a world-famous writer and wrote books such as "Farewell, weapon", "And the sun rises (Fiesta)", "For whom the bell tolls", "Death in the afternoon", and many others.
Few people could create literary characters similar to the author himself like Hemingway
Ernest Hemingway fought in Italy, lived in Cuba, and traveled to Africa.
Ernest Hemingway influenced many writers after World War II.
Hemingway wrote "The Old Man and the Sea", "For Whom the Bell Tolls", and "Islands in the Ocean" at his cottage "La Vijia" in Cuba
The work of Ernest Hemingway is quite popular, for it the author has received many awards, including the Pulitzer and Nobel Prizes.
Ernest Miller Hemingway discussed the effects of loneliness on people.
Ernest Miller, Hemingway made a statement about time and its impact on life.
Ernest Hemingway ended his life 50 years ago.
Ernest Hemingway is one of the emblems of the modern world.
Ernest Miller Hemingway wants to show the world how small true needs are
Ernest Hemingway lived during the United States of the Great Depression and Europe in war.
Ernest Hemingway worked as a journalist in Cuba.
Translation of some of Ernest Hemingway's works, such as A Farewell to Arms, The Old Man and the Sea, are among his masterpieces.
Ernest Hemingway presented one of the most fascinating stories of the 20th century in "The Old Man and the Sea".

China, the United States, Russia, India, Japan, South Korea and the European Union signed the ITER plan to build a superconducting Kamake-type fusion reactor in Cadarache, southern France, to explore the scientific and engineering feasibility of using fusion energy for peaceful purposes.
The task of the ITER project is to demonstrate the scientific and technological feasibility of using thermonuclear energy on an industrial scale
ITER is the first attempt to use a thermonuclear reaction to generate energy on an industrial scale.
The International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) is designed to demonstrate that nuclear fusion can generate electricity on a large, safe and commercial scale
The new stage of the ITER project is the assembly and installation of a fusion reactor

The International Thermonuclear Fusion Experimental Reactor Project, funded and operated by seven members of the European Union (EU), India, Japan, China, Russia, South Korea and the United States, aims to prove the feasibility of nuclear fusion energy.
The International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) is the world’s largest nuclear fusion plant.
The assembly of the experimental thermonuclear reactor ITER is a grandiose international project comparable in scale with the ISS or the Large Hadron Collider.
